Description.Name: The Next Target
Description.Details: The bridge is quiet. Too quiet. Dr. Tilsaye was handed off to Tribe operatives two hours ago, still trembling, still whispering pleas that went unanswered. No one on the crew has said much since. Then the HPG relay chimes. Incoming transmission. Encrypted under Tribe protocols. Darius brings it up on the main display. Text only. No greeting. Just Joanna's signature cold efficiency. "Dr. Tilsaye has provided useful intelligence. A [[TGT_SYSTEM.OwnerDef,{TGT_SYSTEM.OwnerDef.Demonym}]] research complex has an archival facility here on Ryerson that houses historical records related to Clan Wolverine. Research Station Theta-7. The facility must be destroyed immediately. Complete data core elimination is required. No recovery must be possible. Coordinates attached. Proceed at once." The transmission ends. No explanation of methodology. No mention of Dr. Tilsaye's condition. Farah stares at the screen, her expression carefully neutral. "That was fast. We delivered her less than three hours ago." Sumire glances at the timestamp. "Very fast. Either she cooperated immediately or they were very persuasive." Yang grunts from his station. "Persuasive. Right. That's one word for it." Darius shifts uncomfortably. "Maybe they offered her something. Protection for remaining family. Financial compensation. Something that made cooperation worth it." Sumire's voice is flat. "Maybe. Or maybe they didn't need to offer anything at all." The silence stretches. Everyone knows what "persuasive" likely means when dealing with Joanna's operatives. No one wants to say it out loud. Farah finally breaks the tension. "The target coordinates are clear. Research Station Theta-7. If the intel is accurate, it's a legitimate military intelligence target this time." Darius nods slowly. "Records about Clan Wolverine operations. That's strategic intelligence. Worth securing or destroying, depending on which side you're on." Yang stands, stretching. "So we're torching a library now. Great. That'll look fantastic on the resume." Darius looks to you, waiting for the order. The coordinates are loaded. The mission is clear. But the method of intelligence acquisition hangs in the air like smoke.

Description.Name: Prepare for Deployment
Description.Details: [A new contract will be available in the Command Center.]
